atten4.ptxt: When installing the symbol emblem, heat the luggage compartment door outside garnish and symbol emblem using a heat light.

atten3.ptxt: Do not heat the luggage compartment door outside garnish and symbol emblem excessively.

s2.ptxt: Clean the luggage compartment door outside garnish surface.

s3.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the luggage compartment door outside garnish surface.
Remove the double-sided tape from the luggage compartment door outside garnish.
Wipe off any tape adhesive residue with cleaner.

s2.ptxt: Clean the symbol emblem. (If reusing the symbol emblem)

s3.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the symbol emblem.
Remove the double-sided tape from the symbol emblem.
Wipe off any tape adhesive residue with cleaner.
Apply new double-sided tape to the symbol emblem.
Using a heat light, heat the luggage compartment door outside garnish and symbol emblem.
Remove the release paper from the symbol emblem.

atten4.ptxt: After removing the release paper, keep the exposed adhesive free from foreign matter.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT DOOR OUTSIDE GARNISH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips and install the luggage compartment door outside garnish.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT DOOR LOCK CYLINDER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the luggage compartment door lock cylinder with the 2 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LUGGAGE DOOR OPENING SWITCH ASSEMBLY (w/ Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Install the luggage door opening switch assembly with the 2 screws.
Install the luggage compartment door cover with the 13 clips.
